name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Sacramento, CA's Swift Title Loans at 1408 28th St Unit 104 offers same-day payday and title loans with flexible repayment options.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans is located at 1408 28th St Unit 104 in Sacramento, CA, in a convenient standalone storefront. The location is open Monday through Saturday, with extended Saturday hours until 7 PM. Sacramento residents can visit during weekday hours from 9 AM to 5 PM (10 AM on Mondays) or on Saturdays from 9 AM to 7 PM, with the location closed on Sundays.

This Sacramento-based location specializes in title loans and payday advances, offering quick cash solutions when you need them most. Call +1 279-202-9378 to discuss your loan options, apply over the phone, or visit in person at the 28th Street location. The staff can answer questions about loan terms, documentation requirements, and funding timelines.

If you need immediate cash in Sacramento, CA, bring a valid government-issued ID, proof of income, and your vehicle title if seeking a title loan. Payday loans typically fund within one business day, making them ideal for unexpected expenses. Swift Title Loans provides a straightforward borrowing experience for Sacramento residents facing short-term cash needs.
pros: Accepts applicants with bad credit, past bankruptcies, and no collateral requirements (unsecured option mentioned)
Same-day or next-day cash funding advertised with online application option
Loan range from $100-$2,000 for immediate needs up to $50,000 for larger borrowing
Allows borrowers to retain vehicle possession while holding title as collateral
Extended weekday hours (9am-7pm Mon-Fri) and Saturday availability (10am-5pm)
Staff assistance with application and paperwork (specifically mentioned: Alfred)
SSL/TLS security encryption for online applications
Competitive rates compared to other regional finance lenders per customer reviews
cons: Vehicle title held as collateral creates risk of repossession if payments are missed
No specific APR, fees, or interest rate information disclosed on website
Limited online self-service capabilities; no mobile app for account management or payment reminders
Physical location signage unclear for first-time visitors; parking lot capacity issues noted
Limited payment plan options and inflexible scheduling per customer feedback
best_for: Individuals with bad credit or recent bankruptcy needing emergency cash within hours
Vehicle owners needing $1,000-$5,000 quickly who can pledge a car title
Borrowers seeking same-day funding who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans or payday loans
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best suited for individuals with damaged credit or recent bankruptcy who own a vehicle and need emergency cash within 24 hours, typically $1,000-$5,000. The primary caveat is that this is a secured loan using your vehicle title as collateral—failure to repay can result in vehicle repossession, making it higher-risk than unsecured alternatives if available. Borrowers should verify current APR and fees before committing, as these critical terms are not disclosed on the reviewed website.
services: Car title loans secured by vehicle ownership
In-person application assistance at Memphis location
meta_description: Sacramento, CA - Swift Title Loans at 1408 28th St Unit 104 provides same-day payday and title loans.
